headline: Leadership Shift And AI Rivals Might Change The Case For Investing In Adobe (ADBE)
summary: In recent months, Adobe has faced intensifying AI-driven competition in design and content creation, alongside the planned retirement of long-time CEO Shantanu Narayen and several cautious analyst reassessments of its business outlook. At the same time, some institutional investors highlight Adobe’s entrenched workflows, expanding AI-infused product suite, and massive user base as potential strengths in defending its position against newer rivals. We’ll now examine how the leadership...

headline: Adobe's BPC Segment Grows From AI and User Expansion: What's Ahead?
summary: ADBE's BPC segment surges with AI-driven growth and 850M users, but rising competition from tech giants raises questions about its next phase.

headline: Adobe (ADBE) is Thriving in the AI Landscape
summary: Harding Loevner, an asset management company, released its “Global Equity Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. For most of the past 15 years, US equities not only outperformed but created a perception of inevitability around their outperformance. This phenomenon, termed “US exceptionalism,” highlighted exceptional earnings growth, valuations, and a […]

headline: Ex-Google DeepMind and Databricks Engineers Launch Pomo to Apply AI Agent Principles to Decision-Dense Marketing Functions
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 08, 2026--Pomo, an agentic marketing intelligence platform built for mid-market, today announced $4.5 million in seed funding led by Kindred Ventures, with participation from Databricks Ventures, Seven Stars, SV Angel, Timeless Partners, and 645 Ventures. The round also includes backing from prominent angel investors including Scott Belsky, Mehdi Ghissassi, and Massimo Mascaro, all of whom have led AI and product organizations at Adobe, Google DeepMind, and Google AI.
